com.mentor.chs.api.sbom

Interface IXCostResult

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IXObject

    public interface IXCostResult
extends IXObject
    This class represents a Cost Result object, associated to an owner IXSubAssembly for a given IXSBOM. The cost result is evaluated in the context of this owner sub-assembly, for a given task. The task selects descendant sub-assemblies ("matched objects") within the owner sub-assembly and evaluates a formula for these. A cost result represents the result of such formula evaluation for one "matched object".

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Abstract Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      IXSubAssembly getMatchedObject()
      Retrieves the matched object (a sub-assembly which is a descendant of the owner sub-assembly.
      IXSubAssembly getOwnerSubAssembly()
      Retrieves the parent sub-assembly of this cost result.

      • Methods inherited from interface com.mentor.chs.api.IXObject

        getAttribute, getAttributes, getBaseID, getID, getParentID, getProperties, getProperty, getSymbol, toHTML, toHTML

    • Method Detail

      • getOwnerSubAssembly

        IXSubAssembly getOwnerSubAssembly()
        Retrieves the parent sub-assembly of this cost result.
        Returns:
        The parent sub assembly for this cost result

      • getMatchedObject

        IXSubAssembly getMatchedObject()
        Retrieves the matched object (a sub-assembly which is a descendant of the owner sub-assembly.
        Returns:
        The matched object sub-assembly
